rule: Definitions - "Market timeframe" refers to May 22 2025 through June 30 2025 (ET inclusive). "Photographed or videotaped" means any visual recording that captures Volodymyr Zelenskyy. "Wearing a suit" means coordinated business attire consisting of a jacket and matching trousers; additional items such as a vest, waistcoat, or tie do not affect the classification. Military dress uniforms are not suits unless a credible source describes them as such. "Authentic" means the media is not generated by artificial intelligence and has not been materially altered to change Zelenskyy's appearance, clothing, or context; non-substantive edits such as exposure correction, color-balance adjustment, or format conversion that do not affect these aspects are permissible.
Consensus Requirement - A consensus of credible reporting exists when credible sources generally agree on the media and its key aspects.
Interpretation Hierarchy - All substantive rules must be satisfied for a 'Yes' resolution; otherwise the market resolves to 'No'.
The market resolves to 'Yes' if and only if a visual media (photo or video) showing Volodymyr Zelenskyy wearing a suit as defined in Meta-Rule 1 is presented; otherwise it resolves to 'No'.
The media must have been captured and released within the market timeframe, supported by metadata or credible reports, and with no credible evidence to the contrary.
The media must be authentic as defined in Meta-Rule 1.
Whether Rules 1-3 are satisfied is determined by the consensus of credible reporting.
